/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ftp_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftp_server.dir/src/FTPServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftp_server.dir/src/ClientSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftp_server.dir/src/CommandParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftp_server.dir/src/FileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftp_server.dir/src/Authenticator.cpp.o -o ftp_server  -lpthread
